results.rendered_html:
akrodha a. [nāsti krodho yasya] Free from anger.
— dhaḥ [na. ta.] Absence or suppression of anger; akrodhastapasaḥ (vibhūṣaṇaṃ)  Bh. 2. 82 ; regarded as one of the ten duties of an ascetic.
